hero.title: FFmpeg MSVC Prebuilt
hero.subtitle: Ready-to-use FFmpeg binaries for Windows, compiled with Microsoft Visual C++. All dependencies included — download, extract, and run.
hero.noReleases: No releases found. Build data will appear after CI publishes the first release.

features.title: Modern Architectures
features.desc: Native builds for x64, x86, and ARM64 Windows platforms optimized for modern CPUs.

features.title: Self-Contained
features.desc: All dependencies are statically linked or bundled. No DLL hell, just extract and run.

features.title: MSVC Optimized
features.desc: Compiled with the latest Microsoft Visual C++ compiler for maximum Windows performance.

release.title: Release Details
release.selectHint: Direct download links are provided in the grid below.
release.howToUseDesc: Download the zip, extract it to a folder, and add the bin/ folder to your system PATH. MSVC builds require the latest Visual C++ Redistributable.
release.selectBuildDesc: Use the filters to narrow down selection, then click on a build to view metadata.
release.errorDesc: The release you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

tooltips.shared: Dynamic link libraries (.dll). Requires bundling DLLs.
tooltips.static: Self-contained binaries. No external DLLs required.
tooltips.revision: Build revision number for this release
tooltips.progress: Number of completed variants out of total
tooltips.lts: Long Term Support — stable with extended updates
tooltips.latest: Most recent build in this version line
tooltips.dev: Development build from the latest source code
tooltips.hash: SHA-256 checksum for file integrity verification

footer.message: FFmpeg Prebuilt Binaries for Windows MSVC
